nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: JavaScript data-types exercise: an arrow function `show` prints a clicked value with its `typeof` result, wired to seven buttons covering string, number, boolean, undefined, null, array, and object.
nodes.languageNotes: Demonstrates the classic `typeof null === "object"` quirk and uses JSON.stringify to render objects and arrays.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Minimal styling for the data-types exercise: button padding/spacing and a bold, larger output line (#out).

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for a mini calculator exercise: two number inputs, an operator select (+, -, *, /), a compute button, and an output paragraph, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Conditional-logic exercise implementing a four-operation calculator: converts input strings with Number(), branches on the selected operator with if/else if, and renders the equation via a template literal.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the calculator exercise: narrow number inputs, padded select/button controls, and a bold result line.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for an if/else-if exercise: an ice-cream flavor select, a confirm button, and a result paragraph, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Branching exercise: on button click, compares the selected flavor with strict equality and writes a different message for chocolate, vanilla, or any other choice using if / else if / else.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the flavor-check exercise: bold enlarged result text and padded select/button controls.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for an arrow-function exercise: two number inputs separated by a multiplication sign, a multiply button, and an output paragraph, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Function-basics exercise: defines a one-line arrow function `multiply(num1, num2)` with implicit return and calls it from a click handler to display the product via a template literal.
nodes.languageNotes: Teaches implicit return in single-expression arrow functions (no braces or `return` keyword needed).

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the multiply exercise: bold enlarged result text, narrow number inputs, and padded button.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for a countdown-click exercise: a button and a span showing the remaining count starting at 100, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: State-mutation exercise: keeps a mutable `let` counter starting at 100 and decrements it on each button click, updating the span with a template literal.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the countdown exercise: a large pointer-cursor button and bold enlarged count display.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for an image-toggle exercise: an img element with alt text and a hint paragraph, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Attribute-manipulation exercise: toggles an image between two picsum.photos URLs on click by reading the current src with getAttribute and swapping it with setAttribute.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the element `onclick` property instead of addEventListener, and requires network access for the placeholder image service.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the image-toggle exercise: rounded image corners with pointer cursor and a gray hint line.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for a localStorage exercise: a greeting heading, name input, and save/clear buttons, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Browser-persistence exercise: greets a saved name on load via localStorage.getItem, stores the entered name with setItem on save, and deletes it with removeItem on reset.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers the full localStorage API triad (getItem, setItem, removeItem) with an empty-input guard clause.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the greeting exercise: purple greeting heading plus padded, spaced inputs and buttons.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for a loops exercise: a number input, repeat and countdown buttons, and an empty ul list to fill, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Loops exercise with two handlers: a for loop appending list items counting up from 1 to N, and a while loop counting down from N to 1, both building li elements with createElement/appendChild.
nodes.languageNotes: Contrasts for and while loops side by side, including an inline warning about infinite loops when the counter is not decremented.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the loops exercise: padded spaced buttons and an enlarged output list with generous line height.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Markup for a string-methods exercise: a text input prefilled with "hello", an analyze button, and an output paragraph, linked to its sibling stylesheet and script.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: String-methods exercise: on click, reports the input text's length and the results of toLowerCase, toUpperCase, and replaceAll("e", "E"), assembled with template literals into innerHTML.
nodes.languageNotes: Distinguishes the `.length` property from string methods, and uses replaceAll (ES2021) rather than replace.
